description: Leakage/control profile with zero latency and spread/slippage controls only. Not deployable and excludes statutory/brokerage charges.
Default marketable retail proxy with next-event latency, Zerodha equity-intraday charge estimate, and internal impact/slippage assumptions.
Stress proxy with longer event latency, Zerodha equity-intraday charge estimate, and higher internal impact/slippage assumptions.
